next_steps: Perform a skin scraping for microscopic examination to identify Sarcoptes scabiei
Order rapid plasma reagin (RPR) and treponemal-specific antibody testing
Isolate the patient to prevent potential transmission in the healthcare setting
Obtain skin punch biopsy for histopathology
Consider empiric treatment with topical permethrin 5% if clinical suspicion for scabies remains high
Notify public health authorities due to potential shelter outbreak
